assertions.scriptName: foreign key rejects float child against integer parent
timestamp typmod foreign key uses rounded values
assertions.query:
SELECT c.id, c.ts::text, p.ts::text
						FROM timestamp_typmod_fk_child c
						JOIN timestamp_typmod_fk_parent p ON c.ts = p.ts
						ORDER BY c.id;

assertions.scriptName: domain typmod foreign key uses coerced values
assertions.query:
SELECT c.id, c.amount::text, p.amount::text
						FROM numeric_domain_fk_child c
						JOIN numeric_domain_fk_parent p ON c.amount = p.amount
						ORDER BY c.id;

assertions.scriptName: text domain typmod foreign key uses coerced values
assertions.query:
SELECT c.id, c.label, length(c.label), p.label
							FROM varchar_domain_fk_child c
							JOIN varchar_domain_fk_parent p ON c.label = p.label
							ORDER BY c.id;

assertions.scriptName: composite foreign key MATCH FULL enforces full-null rule
assertions.query:
SELECT confmatchtype, pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%MATCH FULL%'
						FROM pg_constraint
						WHERE conrelid = 'match_full_child'::regclass
							AND contype = 'f';

assertions.scriptName: composite foreign key MATCH FULL enforces full-null rule
assertions.query: INSERT INTO match_full_child VALUES (3, 1, NULL);

assertions.scriptName: composite foreign key MATCH FULL enforces full-null rule
assertions.query: INSERT INTO match_full_child VALUES (4, 2, 2);

assertions.scriptName: composite foreign key MATCH FULL enforces full-null rule
composite foreign key MATCH SIMPLE allows partial nulls
assertions.query: INSERT INTO match_simple_child VALUES (5, 2, 2);

assertions.scriptName: DROP TABLE rejects referenced tables
assertions.query: DROP TABLE fk_drop_parent;

assertions.scriptName: DROP TABLE CASCADE drops dependent foreign keys
assertions.query:
SELECT to_regclass('fk_drop_cascade_parent') IS NULL,
							to_regclass('fk_drop_cascade_child') IS NOT NULL,
							count(*) = 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint
						WHERE conrelid = 'fk_drop_cascade_child'::regclass
							AND contype = 'f';

assertions.scriptName: DROP TABLE CASCADE drops dependent foreign keys
DROP COLUMN rejects referenced key columns
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE fk_drop_column_parent DROP COLUMN id;

assertions.scriptName: DROP CONSTRAINT rejects referenced primary keys
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE fk_drop_constraint_parent DROP CONSTRAINT fk_drop_constraint_parent_pkey;

assertions.scriptName: DROP CONSTRAINT CASCADE drops dependent foreign keys
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*) = 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint
						WHERE conrelid = 'fk_drop_constraint_cascade_child'::regclass
							AND contype = 'f';

assertions.scriptName: DROP CONSTRAINT CASCADE drops dependent foreign keys
DROP CONSTRAINT rejects referenced unique keys
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE fk_drop_unique_parent DROP CONSTRAINT fk_drop_unique_parent_code_key;

assertions.scriptName: DROP unique CONSTRAINT CASCADE drops dependent foreign keys
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*) = 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint
						WHERE conrelid = 'fk_drop_unique_cascade_child'::regclass
							AND contype = 'f';

assertions.scriptName: DROP INDEX rejects referenced standalone unique indexes
assertions.query:
SELECT to_regclass('fk_drop_index_restrict_parent_code_idx') IS NOT NULL,
						EXISTS (
							SELECT 1
							FROM pg_constraint
							WHERE conrelid = 'fk_drop_index_restrict_child'::regclass
							  AND contype = 'f'
						);

assertions.query: INSERT INTO fk_drop_index_restrict_parent VALUES (2, 7);

assertions.scriptName: DROP INDEX CASCADE drops dependent foreign keys
assertions.query:
SELECT to_regclass('fk_drop_index_cascade_parent_code_idx') IS NULL,
						NOT EXISTS (
							SELECT 1
							FROM pg_constraint
							WHERE conrelid = 'fk_drop_index_cascade_child'::regclass
							  AND contype = 'f'
						);
